summary: The docs-only ADR and GH-37 carrier stay within the Lode Stage 2 package format lane and establish a usable package metadata contract without creating package/runtime implementation.
reviewed_validation_summary: On PR #56 head 7f41c7ad75cccd17658ebf57c436314836f9ebf6, git diff --check, JSON validation, loom verify, loom fact-chain, loom suite validate, and loom suite carrier validate passed.
follow_ups: Do not treat this approval as completion of real capability package files, final JSON Schema, fixtures, validator, registry, runtime execution, App Library UI, or true write behavior.
Close GH-36/GH-37/GH-38/GH-39 only after merge and post-merge closeout evidence are recorded.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: ADR 0002 defines Stage 2 package root/manifest boundaries, forbidden contents, capability identity, operation/family/tags, lifecycle, version, deprecation, invalidation, consumer fields, research absorption decisions, and non-goals for GH-36/GH-37/GH-38/GH-39.

consumed_inputs.validation: git diff --check; JSON validation; loom verify/fact-chain/suite validate/suite carrier validate
